offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate dunning emails instead of manual tracking and follow-up via email.
problem: Late payments due to lack of follow-up on outstanding invoices.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about invoicing
Direct message 20-50 Etsy sellers with demo
Participate in Etsy seller forums and groups
try_it: Let users try communication logging and report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing invoices
